decisions.decision: Source code must never reference GSD phases or plans (e.g. 'Phase 20', 'Plan 10b', 'Phase20ParagraphSplitter.swift')
decisions.rationale: Planning artifacts live in .planning/; source should read without GSD context. Phase/plan labels rot as work reorganizes.

decisions.decision: File renames done in commit aea982f: ParagraphInfra/ParagraphSplitter.swift → DoubleNewlineSplitter.swift; ParagraphStore/Phase20ParagraphSplitter.swift → ParagraphStore/ParagraphSplitter.swift (+ matching test files and test suite structs)
decisions.rationale: Xcode object-file basename collision required distinguishing; semantic name chosen over phase prefix.

decisions.decision: Plan 10c deleted CheckCoordinatorSchedulerIntegrationTests.swift + RephraseCardLifecycleTests.swift wholesale rather than rewriting against store
decisions.rationale: Both coupled to deleted ParagraphCacheKey/ParagraphSuggestionCache/LLMCheckScheduler; rewriting not in plan scope.
